prestazioni: G16E-GTS 1.6L turbocharged inline-3 engine: Full forged internals kit from Tomei, including billet crankshaft (88mm stroke), forged I-beam connecting rods (Tomei Poncam), and forged 8.5:1 compression pistons (JE Pro Seal) with custom anti-friction coatings for 30+ psi boost tolerance

Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger with 0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer), and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate for precise boost control up to 35 psi, paired with a custom 3.5" titanium downpipe (HKS Hi-Power) and 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system (GReddy Revolution RS) with dual 100mm titanium tips

Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 30-way rebound damping, 22-way compression damping, and remote reservoirs, featuring GR Corolla-specific spring rates (Front: 12kg/mm, Rear: 10kg/mm) and adjustable camber plates (SuperPro) for aggressive track alignment (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear)

PFC 380mm 6-piston front brake kit with 2-piece rotors (J-Hook slotted) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom stainless steel braided brake line setup (Goodridge) and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for consistent pedal feel under extreme heat

OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.375 final drive ratio) with carbon fiber clutch discs (Tilton 6-paddle) and a billet aluminum flywheel (Spec Stage 4+) for instant power transfer, mated to a reinforced GR-Four AWD system with a 60/40 torque split and a custom Quaife ATB differential in the rear
estetica: Rocket Bunny GR Corolla-specific widebody kit (Version 3) with carbon fiber fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear), custom aluminum overfenders, and a 3D-printed ABS front splitter with integrated canards (9Labs) for optimized aero balance (target: -200kg downforce at 160km/h)

Voltex Type-20 rear wing (1,800mm width, 300mm chord) with carbon fiber construction, dual-element design, and adjustable angle (0° to 20°) for high-speed stability, paired with a custom aluminum undertray (Aeroflow) and diffuser (3-piece carbon fiber, 300mm extension) for rear downforce

Custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with dual 40mm venting ducts (functional) and integrated NACA ducts for intercooler airflow, finished in raw carbon fiber with a clear matte UV-resistant coating (3M Scotchgard Pro Series), and a GR Corolla-specific front bumper lip (Varis) with integrated LED fog lights (Morimoto XB)

Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (GR Corolla-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara (Alcantara Milano) with red stitching and carbon fiber backs (Sparco), paired with a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK) featuring 4-point harness bars, integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360), and a carbon fiber dashboard overlay (TRD Pro-style, 3K twill weave)
